name: report_storm
description: citizen-report spike (4x volume) -- tests dedup + rate handling

name: sybil_injection
description: fabricated reports injected -- tests the Sybil suppression heuristic

name: agent_kill
description: 25% of the fleet disabled at the flood peak -- tests reassignment + lease reclaim

name: forecast_outage
description: river gauge knocked out at peak -> stale COP -- tests misroute handling

name: compound_crisis
description: report storm + comms loss + asset loss together -- the worst case
